package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for json_encoder_recreated_per_item: json encoders recreated for each item payload.
type CaseJsonEncoderRecreatedPerItemDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

func PositiveJsonEncoderRecreatedPerItem(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseJsonEncoderRecreatedPerItemDTO) error {
    for _, item := range items {
        var encoded bytes.Buffer
        encoder := json.NewEncoder(&encoded)
        _ = encoder.Encode(item)
        c.Set(item.ID, encoded.Len())
    }
    return nil
}
